title: Archaic Tooth
description: Upon pickup, [gold]Transform[/gold] a starter card into an [gold]ancient version[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: This relic transforms one of five specific Ironclad starter cards into its ancient equivalent. The starter-to-ancient card mappings are: Bash → Break, Neutralize → Suppress, Unleash → Protector, Falling Star → Meteor Shower, Dualcast → Quadcast. The transformation preserves card upgrades and any enchantments applied to the original card.
